title: Point-in-Time Reconciliation
description: Implement the ability to reconcile an account as of a specific date/time by calculating the recorded balance specifically for that moment.
execution_steps: Update BalanceRepository to support point-in-time calculation
definition_of_done: Reconciliation screen includes a DateTimePicker to select the balance-check time
Recorded balance updates reactively to show the sum of transactions up to the selected time
Discrepancy is correctly computed against the point-in-time balance
Corrections are dated at the reconciliation time
Transactions after the reconciliation time are preserved and unaffected
